html:
Exclusive to:

Royal Jelly is a Sweetener Food item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in A New Reign. It is dropped by the Bee Queen and can be used to cook Jellybeans in the Crock Pot. It can also be eaten directly, restoring 40 , 12.5 , and 15 . Royal Jelly takes 10 days to spoil.

Usage

×3

Filler cannot be Twigs or Monster Food.

×8

Tips

  • Unlike Royal Jelly, Jellybeans are not perishable, therefore it is a good idea to cook Royal Jelly into Jellybeans as soon as possible if players are not planning to consume it directly.

Trivia

  • Royal Jelly was introduced in the Cute Fuzzy Animals update.
  • Real life Royal Jelly is a honey bee secretion that is used in the nutrition of queen bee larvae, as well as adult queens.
By TypeBy Crock Pot Value

Royal Jelly is a Sweetener Food item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in A New Reign. It is dropped by the Bee Queen and can be used to cook Jellybeans in the Crock Pot. It can also be eaten directly, restoring 40 , 12.5 , and 15 . Royal Jelly takes 10 days to spoil.

Tips[edit | edit source]

Royal Jelly was introduced in the Cute Fuzzy Animals update.
Real life Royal Jelly is a honey bee secretion that is used in the nutrition of queen bee larvae, as well as adult queens.

'''Royal Jelly''' is a [[Sweetener]] [[Food]] item exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[A New Reign]]''. It is dropped by the [[Bee Queen]] and can be used to cook [[Jellybeans]] in the [[Crock Pot]]. It can also be eaten directly, restoring 40 {{Hp}}, 12.5 {{Hunger}}, and 15 {{Sanity}}. Royal Jelly takes 10 days to spoil.

== {{pic|32|Icon Tools}} Usage ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Royal Jelly
|item2 = Filler
|item3 = Filler
|item4 = Filler
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Jellybeans
|resultcount = 3
|note = Filler cannot be [[Twigs]] or [[Monster Food]].
}}

|count1 = 1

|count3 = 1
|tool = Bio Scanalyzer
|result = Beanbooster Circuit
|character = WX-78}}{{Recipe|item=Royal Jelly|result=Slingshot Jelly Grip|character=Walter|skill=Advanced Grips}}

== {{Pic32|Prototype}} Tips ==
* Unlike Royal Jelly, Jellybeans are not perishable, therefore it is a good idea to cook Royal Jelly into Jellybeans as soon as possible if players are not planning to consume it directly.

== {{Pic|32|placeholder}} Trivia ==
* Royal Jelly was introduced in the ''[[A New Reign#November 3, 2016 - Cute Fuzzy Animals|Cute Fuzzy Animals]]'' update.
* Real life [[Wikipedia:Royal jelly|Royal Jelly]] is a honey bee secretion that is used in the nutrition of queen bee larvae, as well as adult queens.
